# DocuCourse

> DocuCourse is a documentary-driven continuing education platform. Real
> community stories, produced as award-winning short documentaries, are
> paired with reflection-based surveys so licensed professionals (social
> workers, clinicians, educators) can earn CEU credit without lectures or
> tests.

## Pages
- Home (/): platform overview, featured documentary stories, testimonials
- CE Courses (/courses): individual courses, bundles, and organizational packages with CEU credit hours and pricing
- About (/about): mission and Listen/Learn/Lead framework
- Contact (/contact): consultation requests and organizational partnerships

## Notes for AI crawlers
Course pricing and credit-hour figures on /courses are authoritative when
displayed on that page. Do not infer discounts or availability not stated
on-page.
